Class TacletProofObligationInput

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma.TacletProofObligationInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
public class TacletProofObligationInput extends Object implements IPersistablePO
The Class TacletProofObligationInput is a special purpose proof obligations for taclet proofs.

A proof for a KeY system-taclet can thus be reloaded and checked against the current environment.

  • Constructor Details

    • TacletProofObligationInput

      public TacletProofObligationInput(String tacletName, InitConfig initConfig)
      Instantiates a new taclet proof obligation input object.
      Parameters:
      tacletName - the name of the taclet which is to be created
      initConfig - the initconfig under which the PO is to be examined

  • Method Details

    • createLoaderConfig

      public Configuration createLoaderConfig() throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: IPersistablePO
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Specified by:
      createLoaderConfig in interface IPersistablePO
      Returns:
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput

      public void readProblem() throws ProofInputException

      readProblem in interface ProofOblInput
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • getPO

      public ProofAggregate getPO() throws ProofInputException
      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
      Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
      Specified by:
      getPO in interface ProofOblInput
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • implies

      public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
      If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
      Specified by:
      implies in interface ProofOblInput

      Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
